2164720.name: Catching Spirits
2164720.description:
🌀 Overview

Catching Spirits is a wild and explosive party game for everyone, easy to learn, hard to master! This triangular brawler-platformer will push friendships to their limits.

Only one rule: catch or be caught! Three elements, one winner, who will prevail?

⚔️ An Innovative Game Mechanic

Experience a fresh take on multiplayer battles with a unique triangular combat system.
Hunt your prey while escaping your predator in a nonstop cycle of attack, dodge, and strategy.
It’s a “rock-paper-scissors”-inspired system reinvented for fast, chaotic 1-vs-1-vs-1 action!

🔥 A Shamanic Universe

Step into the magical world of Yoshin Müllen, where three tribes, Earth, Water, and Fire, clash in an ancient rivalry.
Fight as a shaman across mythical arenas, from the Smoky Swamps to the Deadly Jungles and the Crypt beneath the Shaman Temple.
It’s a world full of secrets, where only the most agile survive.

🎨 Vibrant Graphics & Dynamic Soundtrack

Colorful cartoon art meets a lively, hand-drawn aesthetic that bursts with energy.
The dynamic soundtrack reacts to the heat of battle — perfect for a night of laughs and friendly rivalry.

⚡ Game Features

• Local multiplayer for up to 3 players: fast, chaotic, and fun!

• Innovative triangular combat system (1 vs 1 vs 1).

• Short, intense matches (around 3 minutes).

• 9 interactive arenas full of surprises.

• 12 playable shamans, each with unique powers.

• 4 AI levels and 3 bot behaviors to train your reflexes.

• Over 50 trophies and hidden secrets to unlock.

• Fully customizable rules for endless replayability.

• Competitive potential for fierce duels and tournaments.
2164720.supported_languages:
英语, 法语*, 意大利语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 日语, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙
*具有完全音频支持的语言

categories.description: 无需应对快速反应事件
